name: German Sweet Chocolate Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the brownie layer: Melt chocolate and margarine over very low heat or melt in a microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes until margarine is melted. Stir until chocolate is completely melted.
2. Stir in sugar, then eggs and vanilla extract. Mix until well combined.
3. Add flour and mix until smooth. Stir in chopped nuts.
4. Spread the batter into a greased 8-inch pan.
5. To prepare the cream cheese topping: In a separate bowl, mix cream cheese, sugar, egg, and flour until smooth.
6. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the brownie layer and swirl with a knife to marbleize.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean (do not overbake).
8. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into squares. Makes 16 brownies.
